title: WHO IS THIS – Anti Invisibility
description: With this mod, if a player under the effects of an invisibility potion equips any piece of armor (of any type), they will become visible to you.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BO9165o6Hws" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

ㅤ
![idk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34d5002aa4462b7e10fe499eddbf7e627c7a08f8.png)

**🤔 Who Is This? — What is this mod for?...**
- With this mod, if a player under the effects of an invisibility potion equips any piece of armor (of any type), they will become visible to you. This is _most likely_ not considered a cheat because you won’t be able to see invisible players unless they are wearing any piece armor.

**BUT I STILL RECOMMEND ASKING THE ADMINISTRATION ON THE SERVERS WHERE YOU PLAN TO USE IT!**

😎 **Follow the developer on Telegram:** [BVents | Minecraft](https://t.me/bvents)
